question: How much does it cost?
expected: Personal is $9/month or $89/year, Pro is $29/month or $290/year, Enterprise is $79/month per seat with annual billing only.

fact_checks.description: States the Personal plan price ($9/month or $89/year)
States the Pro plan price ($29/month or $290/year)
States the Enterprise plan price ($79/month per seat)
Mentions Enterprise is per seat or annual billing only
Covers all three plan tiers (Personal, Pro, Enterprise)

question: Can I try it for free?
expected: Yes, there is a 14-day free trial on any plan, no credit card required.

fact_checks.description: Confirms a free trial is available
Specifies the trial duration is 14 days
States the trial is available on any plan
States no credit card is required

question: Does it work on my iPhone?
expected: Yes, CloudSync Pro supports iOS along with Windows, Mac, Linux, Android, and web browsers.

fact_checks.description: Gives a clear yes -- it works on iPhone/iOS
Mentions at least 3 other supported platforms (Windows, Mac, Linux, Android, web)

question: I want to cancel, can I get a refund?
expected: You can cancel anytime. Within the first 30 days you get a prorated refund. After 30 days there is no refund but you keep access until the end of your billing period.

fact_checks.description: States that cancellation is possible at any time
Mentions prorated refund within the first 30 days
States the 30-day refund window
States no refund after 30 days
Mentions access continues until end of billing period

question: How much storage do I get on the Pro plan?
expected: The Pro plan includes 500GB of storage.

fact_checks.description: States 500GB for the Pro plan
Specifically addresses the Pro plan (not a generic data dump)

question: What happens if two people edit the same file?
expected: The newest edit wins and the older version is automatically saved to version history so nothing is lost.

fact_checks.description: States the newest/latest edit wins
States the older version is saved to version history
Reassures that nothing is lost

question: Can I access my files without internet?
expected: Yes, files marked as available offline can be accessed without an internet connection.

fact_checks.description: Confirms files can be accessed without internet
Mentions files must be marked as available offline (conditional access)

question: Is my data encrypted?
expected: Yes, CloudSync Pro uses end-to-end encryption with AES-256.

fact_checks.description: Confirms data is encrypted
Mentions end-to-end encryption
Specifies AES-256

question: How fast is your support response?
expected: It depends on your plan: Personal gets email within 24 hours, Pro gets email and chat within 4 hours, Enterprise gets email, chat, phone, and a dedicated account manager.

fact_checks.description: States that response time depends on the plan
Mentions Personal plan: email support, 24-hour response
Mentions Pro plan: email + chat, 4-hour response
Mentions Enterprise plan: phone support and/or dedicated account manager

question: Can I upload a 15GB video file?
expected: Large files over 10GB are supported on Pro and Enterprise plans only. If you are on Personal, you would need to upgrade.

fact_checks.description: States that files over 10GB are supported (so yes, 15GB is possible)
States this is only available on Pro and/or Enterprise plans
Mentions that Personal plan users need to upgrade
